notes: Maps the Python pipeline's work_type vocabulary (snake_case) to the Swift app's contentType vocabulary (kebab-case). The exporter applies this after pipeline runs. Silent-film is intentionally NOT in this table — it comes from the separate `is_silent` column because year alone is an unreliable predictor. When is_silent is true, the exporter overrides contentType to 'silent-film' regardless of what this mapping would produce.
